name: YT New Video Upload
description: Automated workflow: YT New Video Upload. This workflow integrates 11 different services: stickyNote, httpRequest, youTube, googleDriveTrigger, code. It contains 22 nodes and follows best practices for error handling and security.
shortDescription: YT New Video Upload workflow containing 14 nodes.

originalWorkflowJson.name: YT New Video Upload

nodes.name: Download New Video
nodes.notes: This googleDrive node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: New Video?
nodes.notes: This googleDriveTrigger node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Create Description

values.content:
You are a professional copywriter.  
You receive the transcript of an economics-related video and create a detailed but concise summary (with paragraphs) about its content.  

Write a detailed summary (with paragraphs) about the content of the podcast.  

Your output will be used for the YouTube video description. Start with something like: "In this video..." or "In this episode...".  
Write from my perspective, using phrases like "my opinion" or "in my view," in the first person, but never phrases like "In this episode, I learn..." or similar, as I always explain or discuss the content. YOU NEVER WRITE THINGS LIKE "THE SPEAKER SAYS"! Always from my position.  

Important: Use clear and assertive statements as formulated in the transcript. Avoid neutral or uncertain phrases like "it could," "I assume that," "possibly," or similar. The statements should be confident and definitive to powerfully convey the podcast’s content.  
Include a few (2-4) emojis where appropriate.  
End the post with 2-5 relevant hashtags. The hashtags should be broad, like #economics #money #gold, or similar, depending on what fits.

nodes.notes: This openAi node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.notes: This lmChatGoogleGemini node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: YT Tags

parameters.text:

options.systemMessage:
This video is about the future gold price and how it affects the returns of high-performing assets like stocks and bonds in their adjusted returns.

Expected output:
Gold price, future gold price, gold investments, asset returns, stocks and bonds, investment returns, adjusted returns, gold market, financial markets, gold price forecast, economic trends, investing in gold, stock market analysis, bond market, investment strategies, inflation and gold, gold vs. stocks, financial analysis, precious metals, portfolio management, market outlook, investment tips

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Drive  O Auth2  A P I details
open Ai  A P I details
google Palm  A P I details
you Tube  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "New Video?".
Open the "Download New Video" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Create Description" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "2.5FlashPrev" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "YT Tags" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Get Transcript" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Update Video's Metadata" node (n8n-nodes-base.youTube) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "YT Title" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Delete File from Upload Folder (Optional)" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Upload Video to Youtube" node (n8n-nodes-base.youTube) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
